candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component excluding separately reported depreciation; best match under SG&A hierarchy.

candidates.why: Depreciation component must be excluded from SG&A components per instructions.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D asset, not current-period R&D expense.
